recipe_generation.prompt: For user Adam Schoen: grilled cheese sandwitch

description: A classic comfort food, reimagined for Adam Schoen. This vegan grilled cheese delivers a perfectly crispy, golden-brown exterior with an irresistibly gooey, melty plant-based cheese center. The ultimate quick and satisfying meal for any time of day.

dry.name: Your favorite bread
dry.notes: Sourdough or a sturdy white bread work best

other.name: Vegan cheese slices
other.notes: Cheddar or Provolone style recommended for best melt

instructions.description: Lay the two slices of bread on a cutting board or plate. Spread 1 tablespoon of vegan butter evenly on one side of each slice.
Place one slice of bread, butter-side down, in a non-stick skillet or pan over medium heat.
Immediately top the bread in the pan with the vegan cheese slices, arranging them in an even layer to cover the bread.
Place the second slice of bread on top, with the buttered side facing up.
Grill for 3-5 minutes, until the bottom slice is golden brown and crispy. Carefully flip the sandwich with a spatula.
Grill the second side for another 3-5 minutes, or until it is also golden brown and the cheese is completely melted and gooey.
Remove from the pan, let it rest for a moment, then slice in half diagonally and serve immediately.

name: Adam's Ultimate Vegan Grilled Cheese
notes: The key to a great vegan grilled cheese is using a brand of cheese known for its melting quality. For an extra savory kick, add a thin layer of dijon mustard or a sprinkle of garlic powder to the inside of the bread. Sliced tomato or vegan bacon also make excellent additions.
